tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Since you've been away[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
I've been down and lonely[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Since you've been away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
I've been thinking of you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
Try to understand[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
The reason you left me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
What were you going through?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
Ooh,      I'm missing you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me why the road turns[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Ooh ooh,     I'm missing you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me why the road turns[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]
Oh, oh-oh-oh[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
As I look around[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
I see things that remind me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Just to see you smile[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
Made my heart fill with joy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
I'll still recall[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]               [ch]Am7[/ch]
All those dreams we shared together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Where did you run to, boy?[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Ooh ooh ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
I'm missing you[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me why the road turns[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Bm[/ch]
Ooh ooh[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'm missing you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch]
Tell me why the road turns[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]D/C[/ch]
Sometimes I've wondered[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]D/C[/ch]
I didn't understand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]D/C[/ch]
 Just where you were trying to go[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]          [ch]C/D[/ch]
Only you knew the plan[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]D/C[/ch]
  And I tried to be there[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]D/C[/ch]
  But you wouldn't let me in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]               [ch]D/C[/ch]
  But now you've gone away boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  I feel so broken hearted[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  I knew the day we started[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  That we were meant to be[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
If only you would let me![/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I've cried so many tears[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  Gotta face now all my fears[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  We let time tick away[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I need you boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Here today![/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
There was so much you gave to my heart, to my soul[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                            [ch]C[/ch]
There was so much of your dreams that were never told[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                                     [ch]D[/ch]
You had so much hope for a brighter day[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Why were you my flower[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]
Plucked away (Ooh-ooh, I'm missing you)[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me why the road turns (Tell me why the road turns)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]
Ooh ooh I'm missing you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me why the road turns (Tell me why the road turns), tell me, tell me why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
Ooh-ooh, I'm missing you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me why the road turns (Tell me why the road turns), oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                                  [ch]Am7[/ch]
Ooh-ooh (Don't understand it), I'm missing you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Uh-huh, can you hear me?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]
Ooh-ooh, I'm missing you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me why the road turns (Tell me why the road turns)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]Am7[/ch]
Ooh-ooh (Ooh), I'm missing you (I'm missing you)[/tab]
